scripts.test: bun test --cwd packages/core && bun test --cwd packages/cli && bun test --cwd packages/plugin-jira && bun test --cwd packages/plugin-bitbucket && bun test --cwd packages/plugin-ide && bun test --cwd packages/plugin-claude && bun test --cwd packages/plugin-agent-cli && bun test --cwd packages/plugin-portless
scripts.build: bun run build:core && bun run build:cli && bun run build:plugins
scripts.build:plugins: for d in packages/plugin-*; do (cd $d && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json); done
scripts.release: bun run clean && bun run build && bunx changeset publish
